name: CI

on:
  push:

jobs:
  vuejs-eslint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Get yarn cache directory path
        id: yarn-cache-dir-path
        run: echo "::set-output name=dir::$(yarn cache dir)"

      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: yarn-cache # use this to check for `cache-hit` (`steps.yarn-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'`)
        with:
          path: ${{ steps.yarn-cache-dir-path.outputs.dir }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-yarn-${{ hashFiles('**/yarn.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-yarn-

      - name: install node-gyp
        run: yarn global add node-gyp

      - name: Yarn install
        run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: eslint
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
        run:  npx eslint resources/ specs/ --ext .js,.ts,.vue
  vuejs-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Get yarn cache directory path
        id: yarn-cache-dir-path
        run: echo "::set-output name=dir::$(yarn cache dir)"

      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: yarn-cache # use this to check for `cache-hit` (`steps.yarn-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'`)
        with:
          path: ${{ steps.yarn-cache-dir-path.outputs.dir }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-yarn-${{ hashFiles('**/yarn.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-yarn-

      - name: install node-gyp
        run: yarn global add node-gyp

      - name: Yarn install
        run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: bulild
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
        run: yarn build

  vuejs-jest:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Get yarn cache directory path
        id: yarn-cache-dir-path
        run: echo "::set-output name=dir::$(yarn cache dir)"

      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: yarn-cache # use this to check for `cache-hit` (`steps.yarn-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'`)
        with:
          path: ${{ steps.yarn-cache-dir-path.outputs.dir }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-yarn-${{ hashFiles('**/yarn.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-yarn-

      - name: install node-gyp
        run: yarn global add node-gyp

      - name: Yarn install
        run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: jest
        run: yarn test:unit

  django-pytest:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Python
        # The actions/cache step below uses this id to get the exact python version
        id: setup-python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.8'

      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/virtualenvs
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ steps.setup-python.outputs.python-version }}-pipenv-${{ hashFiles('Pipfile.lock') }}

      - name: Start MySQL
        run: sudo systemctl start mysql

      - name: Initialize DB
        run: |
          mysql -u root -proot -e "create user conpass@'127.0.0.1' identified by 'secret';"
          mysql -u root -proot -e "grant all privileges on *.* to conpass@'127.0.0.1';"
          mysql -u root -proot -e "create database conpass default charset utf8mb4;"
          mysql -u root -proot -e "create database test_conpass default charset utf8mb4;"

      - name: Install deps
        run: |
          sudo apt update -y
          sudo apt install libzbar0 libxml2-dev libxmlsec1-dev libxmlsec1-openssl -y

      - name: install pipenv
        run: pip install pipenv

      - name: Recreate pipenv env and force‑build xmlsec
        run: |
          pipenv --rm || true
          pipenv install --dev --clear

          pipenv run pip install --no-binary xmlsec xmlsec

      - name: Run pytest
        env:
          DB_PORT: 3306
        run: |
          pipenv run pytest \
            --showlocals \
            --junitxml=junit.xml \
            --cov-report=html:htmlcov \
            --cov=app

  django-lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Python
        id: setup-python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.8'

      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/virtualenvs
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ steps.setup-python.outputs.python-version }}-pipenv-${{ hashFiles('Pipfile.lock') }}

      - name: Install deps
        run: |
          sudo apt update -y
          sudo apt install libzbar0 libxml2-dev libxmlsec1-dev libxmlsec1-openssl -y

      - name: install pipenv
        run: pip install pipenv

      - name: Pipenv install
        run: pipenv install --dev

      - name: Run lint
        run: pipenv run lint --tee

  check-typo:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: typo conpass
        env:
          WORD: compass
        run: |
          if grep -iE "\\b$WORD\\b" -r ./ --exclude-dir=.github; then false; else true; fi

  docker-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    if:
      contains('
      refs/heads/develop
      refs/heads/main
      ', github.ref)
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: build docker image
        env:
          DOCKER_BUILDKIT: 1
          APP_IMAGE_TAG: conpass/app # TODO: GCPのレジストリに変更予定
        run: |
          docker build --cache-from=$APP_IMAGE_TAG \
            --progress plain \
            --tag $APP_IMAGE_TAG \
            --file docker/app/Dockerfile .
